title: FORM:-  START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST
category: 3. EP6 START & End of shift checklist

items.question: Clean Fixtures ,Tool & Working Area
OE Deploy as per skill matrix
Switch on power supply
Check the air pressure
Wear personal protective equipments(PPE)
Check PM status of Workstation/Machine
Check the cundition of running model fixture/ tools & PM status  (Should be within due date mentioned)

Availability of rejection bin/Identification tags 
( Red/Yellow/Green)
Calibration of instruments

sections.title: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question:
Motor & shroud locking Nut/Screw gun torque achieving verification. For S201/S215 GSL/DSL,W153&Altroz  -Torque (2.2 to 3.0) NM for Nexon GSL/Curve (4.0 to 5.0)NM
Note down in startup & endup report
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK condition:- Do motor shroud locking screw half torque, FMS assembly will not get de-clamped and barcode will not Generate
For OK condiion:- Do motor shroud locking screw complete torque as per requirement, FMS assembly will not de-clamped and barcode will Generate | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Shroud & Resistor locking screws gun torque achieving verification. Torque (1.2 to 1.8) NM
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK condition:- Do resistor locking screw half torque fan motor shroud assembly will not get de-clamped and barcode will not Generate
For OK condition:-Do resistor locking screw complete torque as per requirement  fan motor shroud assembly will get de-clamped and barcode will Generate | OK / NOT OK

items.question:
Resister Colour Sensing POKAYOKE
[ for S201/S215 DSL - Black Colour Resister
S201/S215 GSL - White Colour Resister ] For NOT OK Condition : FMS Assembly will not get clamped if specified color resister is not fixed on Shroud.  
For OK Condition : FMS Assembly will get clamped if specified color resister is fixed on Shroud.
Poka-yoke is been added in the fixture to differential between S201/S215 shroud For OK Condition: Check the block position should be in front and sensore should be in on condition for S215 model.
Motor Barcode Scanning (As per Model)
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition : FMS Assembly will not get clamped and Gun will not Active if Motor Barcode not scanned by Scanner. 
For OK Condition : FMS Assembly will  get clamped and Gun will  Active if Motor Barcode scanned by Scanner. | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Clean Fixtures ,Tool & Working Area
Removal and Record of rejection
Switch off power supply

sections.title: END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question:
Motor & shroud locking Nut/Screw gun torque achieving verification. For S201/S215 GSL/DSL,W153&Altroz  -Torque (2.2 to 3.0) NM for Nexon GSL/Curve (4.0 to 5.0)NM
Note down in startup & endup report

For OK condiion:- Do motor shroud locking screw complete torque as per requirement, FMS assembly will not de-clamped and barcode will Generate | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Shroud & Resistor locking screws gun torque achieving verification. Torque (1.2 to 1.8) NM for other model
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK condition:- Do resistor locking screw half torque fan motor shroud assembly will not get de-clamped and barcode will not Generate
For OK condition:-Do resistor locking screw complete torque as per requirement  fan motor shroud assembly will get de-clamped and barcode will Generate | OK / NOT OK

items.question:
Resister Colour Sensing POKAYOKE
[ for S201/S215 DSL - Black Colour Resister
S201/S215 GSL - White Colour Resister ] For NOT OK Condition : FMS Assembly will not get clamped if specified color resister is not fixed on Shroud.  
For OK Condition : FMS Assembly will get clamped if specified color resister is fixed on Shroud.
Poka-yoke is been added in the fixture to differential between S201/S215 shroud For OK Condition: Check the block position should be in front and sensore should be in on condition for S215 model.
Motor Barcode Scanning (As per Model)

For NOT OK Condition : FMS Assembly will not get clamped and Gun will not Active if Motor Barcode not scanned by Scanner. 
For OK Condition : FMS Assembly will  get clamped and Gun will  Active if Motor Barcode scanned by Scanner. | OK / NOT OK

closing_fields.label: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING  CELL COORDINATOR

notes: NAME OF MACHINE/STATION:- Radiator Assembly Cell 4-FAN MOTOR SHROUD ASSEMBLY
FORM:- START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST

A)Condition for StartUp :-
1] At Start of shift /End of shift
2] Model &/or Set up change
3] Pokayoke Failure, corrected & production resumed
4] If poka yoke bypassed and production continued as per alternate poka yoke bypass document
5] More than 4 hour Planned shut down
6) During Abnormal Situations (6a-Emergency Alarm / 6b-Power Failure / 6c-Machine or Tool Breakdown - more than 45 mins / 6d-Inspection Guage or Instrument breakdown or fallen down)
B)Reactivity Rule:- If any NC is found inform to CC/ Shift Incharge , Initiate actions for correction & After closure of NC treat the shift as a fresh shift , Start checking from the begining of the check points in the next column.
C) Guideline for Supervisor's Approval: Supervisor need to do tick mark ( √ ) after verification of highlighted points.
